metadata.description: Primary deployment location for all resources.
Environment name for resource naming and tagging.
Deterministic prefix for Azure resource names.
Optional tags applied to all resources.
SQL admin login for Azure SQL server.
SQL admin password for Azure SQL server.
Azure SQL database name used by backend API.
Azure SQL server/database location. Defaults to deployment location but can be overridden for regional capacity constraints.
SQL strategy: provision creates SQL resources via IaC; existing uses pre-created SQL resources.
Existing Azure SQL server name (without .database.windows.net). Required when sqlProvisioningMode is existing.
Existing Azure SQL database name. Required when sqlProvisioningMode is existing.
Entra AD admin login (email) for Azure SQL server. Optional.
Entra AD admin object ID for Azure SQL server. Required if sqlEntraAdminLogin is provided.
Azure OpenAI API key for backend AI calls.
Azure OpenAI model deployment ID used by backend.
Azure OpenAI endpoint URL used by backend.
AI services strategy: external uses provided endpoint/key; provision creates an Azure AI Foundry (AIServices) resource, project, and model deployments.
Azure AI Foundry (AIServices) account name when aiServicesProvisioningMode is provision. Leave empty to auto-generate.
Azure AI Foundry project name created under the provisioned AI Services account.
Foundry project provisioning mode. arm creates the project in Bicep; cli defers project creation to post-provision CLI automation for reliability.
Chat model deployment name. When provisioning, this deployment is created and used as AZURE_OPENAI_MODEL_ID.
Chat model catalog name for Azure OpenAI deployment.
Chat model version for Azure OpenAI deployment.
Embeddings model deployment name provisioned for ingestion/RAG.
Embeddings model catalog name.
Embeddings model version.
Embedding vector dimensions for the embeddings deployment used by Azure AI Search vector field.
OpenAI/Foundry auth mode for backend and worker. managed-identity tries MI first with API-key fallback.
AI runtime mode for backend/worker. Use azure for cloud deployments.
Storage account name override. Leave empty to auto-generate.
Blob container name used for uploaded documents.
JSON array string of allowed origins for browser-based Blob SAS uploads.
Storage auth mode for backend/worker. managed-identity tries MI first with connection-string fallback.
Azure AI Search service name override. Leave empty to auto-generate.
Azure AI Search service location. Defaults to deployment location but can be overridden to a region with available capacity.
Azure AI Search strategy: provision creates Search via IaC; existing reuses a pre-created Search service.
Azure AI Search index name for document chunks.
Backend Azure AI Search authentication mode. api-key uses AZURE_SEARCH_API_KEY, managed-identity uses ACA managed identity token with API-key fallback.
Container image registry mode. managed provisions Azure Container Registry; external uses public/authenticated external images such as GHCR.
External registry server used when containerRegistryMode is external.
External registry username used when containerRegistryMode is external and the registry requires authentication.
External registry password or token used when containerRegistryMode is external and the registry requires authentication.
Enable Log Analytics and workspace-based Application Insights for the Container Apps environment.
Enable Aspire Dashboard in the Container Apps environment.
Minimum replicas for the backend container app.
Minimum replicas for the frontend container app.
Minimum replicas for the worker container app.
Container image for the backend app.
Container image for the frontend app.
Container image for the worker app.

properties.appLogsConfiguration: [if(equals(variables('appLogsDestination'), 'log-analytics'), createObject('destination', variables('appLogsDestination'), 'logAnalyticsConfiguration', createObject('customerId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', format('{0}-law', variables('baseName'))), '2023-09-01').customerId, 'sharedKey', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', format('{0}-law', variables('baseName'))), '2023-09-01').primarySharedKey)), createObject('destination', variables('appLogsDestination')))]

configuration.secrets: [concat(concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'azure-openai-api-key', 'value', if(variables('useProvisionedAiServices'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', variables('resolvedAiServicesAccountName')), '2025-06-01').key1, parameters('azureOpenAiApiKey'))), createObject('name', 'storage-connection-string', 'value', format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName={0};AccountKey={1};EndpointSuffix={2}', variables('resolvedStorageAccountName'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('resolvedStorageAccountName')), '2023-05-01').keys[0].value, environment().suffixes.storage)), createObject('name', 'search-api-key', 'value', if(variables('useExistingSearch'), listAdminKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').primaryKey, listAdminKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').primaryKey)), createObject('name', 'search-query-key', 'value', if(empty(if(variables('useExistingSearch'), listQueryKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').value, listQueryKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').value)), if(variables('useExistingSearch'), listAdminKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').primaryKey, listAdminKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').primaryKey), first(if(variables('useExistingSearch'), listQueryKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').value, listQueryKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', variables('resolvedSearchServiceName')), '2023-11-01').value)).key))), createArray()), variables('sharedRegistrySecrets'))]
configuration.registries: [if(variables('useManagedRegistry'), createArray(createObject('server', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ContainerRegistry/registries', toLower(replace(format('{0}acr', variables('baseName')), '-', ''))), '2023-07-01').loginServer, 'identity', resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', variables('containerAppsManagedIdentityName')))), if(variables('hasExternalRegistryCredentials'), createArray(createObject('server', parameters('externalRegistryServer'), 'username', parameters('externalRegistryUsername'), 'passwordSecretRef', 'registry-password')), createArray()))]
